questionHtml:
The two containers shown are connected by a valve. What is the total pressure after the valve is opened and the two gas samples are allowed to mix at constant temperature?


A.  1.5 × 105 Pa

B.  2.3 × 105 Pa

C.  2.5 × 105 Pa

D.  5.0 × 105 Pa

meta.title: The two containers shown are connected by a valve. What is the total pressure after the valve is opened and the two gas samples are allowed to mix at constant temperature? A. 1.5 ×
